tasks.definition: Implementation of Case 1: Category ID to Another Category ID, regarding the Kaspi Catalog Hierarchy Revisions
tasks.latest_update:
Testing has started, but company-wide QA environment issues are delaying deployment. Another part of the project is underway, and the work will extend into next sprint.

Next Steps: resolve the QA environment issue and continue the remaining implementation.

tasks.task_name: Automatic link generation for Brand / Magaza Pages
tasks.definition: To automate internal linking by dynamically injecting high-impression Brand+Category URLs into page widgets to boost crawl equity and organic rankings.
tasks.latest_update:
we are having a problem with the brand names with "-". We will discuss this problem with Miray and try to find the brands directly, otherwise we will go for a new solution.

Next Steps: continue to the next checkpoint.

tasks.definition: Resolve 1,050ms INP delay. Move JS/SVG files to local domain & extend cache duration.
tasks.latest_update:
Work is complete and will be monitored in production.

Next Steps: Follow live performance and confirm stability.

tasks.definition: Fix inconsistent canonicals caused by SF-5398 URL slug variations. Shift to 301 redirect logic.
tasks.latest_update:
We will measure the issue by comparing SKU-level URL counts and impressions, then align with the SEO team on impact and effort.

Next Steps: Review the data and confirm the fix scope.

tasks.definition: Deleting user agents for the tools requested by the SEO Team
tasks.latest_update:
Deployment is complete and verified.

Next Steps: No further action needed.

tasks.definition: Introduce a deterministic, SEO-driven default product ranking logic for Level-1 categories, ensuring that Googlebot consistently sees the most SEO-valuable products ranked at the top of the listing
tasks.latest_update:
and deployed.

Next Steps: No further action required.

tasks.task_name: Enhanced Breadcrumb Trial Links for Brand+Category & PDP Pages
tasks.definition: Modify breadcrumb linking for Brand+Category pages and PDP pages so that all breadcrumb links use Brand+Category combinations instead of pure category URLs.
tasks.latest_update:
Blocked by PLP + PDP team alignment and timeline is at risk.

Next Steps: confirm alignment and restart planning.

tasks.definition: add a new "Beyaz Eşya Düğün Paketi" link to the "Elektronik -> Beyaz Eşya" category of the header menu across both desktop and mobile platforms to support a category team demand.

Implemented and deployed across desktop and mobile.

Next Steps: No further action needed.

tasks.task_name: Popüler Aramalar widget enhancement for PDP + PLP Pages
tasks.definition: to strengthen internal linking and SEO by expanding the "Popüler Aramalar" widget from 20 to 30 links, specifically integrating high-impression Brand+Category (XC) pages alongside existing search pages using dynamic, data-driven relevance logic.
tasks.latest_update:
ETA moved to Q2-2 and the work stays deferred for the next cycle.

Next Steps: Revisit in Q2-2 sprint planning and confirm the restart date.

tasks.definition: 4-step plan: Exclude /ara from backlink logic, bulk-create collections, & update Varnish 301 rules.
